title: [Let's Do] Camping
description: How about we sleep outside today? Grab your backpack, pack the tent, grill, and sleeping bag, and let's go!
body:
![Camping](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/camping.png)

Open Skies & Quiet Campfires

The adventurous outdoor chapter of the Let's Do collection


"Pack light. Stay longer."


How about we sleep outside today? Grab your backpack, pack the tent, the grill and a sleeping bag. The trail is waiting.
Camping brings a simple, honest outdoor experience to your world. No unnecessary systems. Just fresh air, firelight and practical gear.
Step away from the village. Listen to the forest.
## Travel Prepared
- 7 new Backpacks providing 3 additional rows of storage - Pure utility. No extra gimmicks - Craftable bundles for compact organization
Carry what matters.
## Camp Anywhere
- Tents in all colors - Matching sleeping bags for every style - Perfect for expeditions, roleplay or scenic builds
Pitch your tent. Watch the stars.
## Fire & Food
- A functional grill for cooking meat - Grilled meals provide improved nutrition and saturation - Gather around the fire and share the moment
Simple food tastes better outdoors.

Follow the trail.

Light the fire.

Sleep under the stars.


Have fun outdoors.


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
